tools.name: SpatialLabs Runtime Platform
tools.manualInstallGuide: Install SpatialLabs Runtime Platform from Acer support or your OEM driver bundle (often bundled with SpatialLabs Experience Center). Experience Center is the user-facing app; Runtime Platform is the underlying driver this app checks via HKLM\Software\SpatialLabsRuntime. Either may satisfy the requirement on SpatialLabs hardware.

tools.name: Odyssey Hub
tools.manualInstallGuide: Install Samsung Odyssey Hub from Samsung support. Required for some Odyssey 3D utility features.

tools.name: VRto3D
tools.manualInstallGuide: Optional bridge for VR-first titles on glasses-free 3D displays. Install from the VRto3D project page and register the install folder in Settings.

tools.name: NVIDIA 3D Vision (legacy)
tools.manualInstallGuide: Legacy stereoscopic stack for 3D Vision Ready titles. Requires compatible GeForce drivers, 120 Hz display, and 3D Vision glasses or 3DTV Play. Deprecated on modern Windows — use only if you still run a supported driver branch.

tools.name: OpenXR / PCVR bridge
tools.manualInstallGuide: Install your OpenXR runtime (SteamVR, Virtual Desktop, etc.) when launching UEVR or native VR titles through a headset path.
